title: DeukPack pipeline profile
description: Schema for build-deukpack.config.json — path routing and pipeline toggles consumed by the build script.

clientDeukDefinePath.description: Path under unityClientFolder for core generated C# (DTO/protocol). EF DbContext is excluded when unity.enableEfPersistence is true.

deukPackUnityRuntimePluginsPath.description: UPM package-relative folder for DeukPack.Protocol / ExcelProtocol DLL sync.

libRoot.description: IDL-adjacent tree for generated csharp/cpp/js (e.g. idls or libDeukDefine).

buildStagingRoot.description: Parent of DeukPack staging .build; default is libRoot.

typescriptSubdir.description: Under libRoot, folder name for TypeScript output (e.g. javascript).

generatedSubdir.description: Optional subfolder under each language root for generated files.

csharpGeometrySource.description: Extra fixed C# sources copied into client DeukDefine with generated code.

deukPackRepo.description: Path to DeukPack repo relative to project root; DEUKPACK_ROOT env overrides.

deukNavigationRepo.description: DeukNavigation sibling path; empty string skips. DEUKNAVIGATION_ROOT overrides.

unityClientFolder.description: Unity project folder under project root (e.g. unity_app). Default: {projectInitial}_client.

enableEfPersistence.description: When true, passes DeukPack --ef, keeps DeukPackDbContext.g.cs out of Assets/DeukDefine, and copies it to persistenceAdapterLibPath and optional persistenceAdapterClientPath.

persistenceAdapterLibPath.description: Relative to project root: dotnet/source-of-truth folder for generated EF adapter file(s).

persistenceAdapterClientPath.description: Relative to project root: Unity server tree directory (folder) or explicit .cs path for DeukPackDbContext.g.cs copy.
